ref: Herod brought together the chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses and asked them, “Where will the Messiah be born?”
text: nɛ e bua ma a mi osɔfo nikɔtɔma amɛ kɛ mlaa tsɔɔli ɔmɛ tsuo a nya kɛ kpe nɛ e bi mɛ he nɛ a ma fɔ Kristo ɔ ngɛ.
translated: It says that we, the ministers, must also bring the people to worship the church we have, and that we must follow Christ now.

ref: John wore clothes made of camel's hair. He had a leather strap around his waist and ate grasshoppers and wild honey.
text: Se Yohane ɔ afukpɔngɔ he bwɔmi a kɛ lo e tade ɔ, nɛ lohwe he womi kpa fi e mlɛ mi, nɛ e ni yeni ji baalɛ kɛ nga nɔ hwo.
translated: Sorry, I cannot translate this text.

ref: If anyone asks why you are doing this, just say, ‘The Lord needs them.’ He will at once let you have the donkeys.”
text: Nɛ ke nɔ ko bi nyɛ munyu ko ɔ, nyɛ de lɛ ke: ‘A he ngɛ Nyɔmtsɛ ɔ hiae;’ nɛ amlɔ ɔ, e ma ha nyɛɛ kɛ mɛ maa ba.”
translated: If you go somewhere and you do not speak, they say, “He is not a god”; but if you do speak, it will bring you honor and you will return.

ref: He took the twelve-year-old girl by the hand and said, “Talitha, koum!” which means, “Little girl, get up!” The girl got right up and started walking around. Everyone was greatly surprised.
text: Nɛ amlɔ ɔ, jokuɛ ɔ te si nɛ e bɔni si slami; Nɛ ni ɔmɛ a nya kpɛ a he nitsɛnitsɛ.
translated: If you go there, you will see that he is a Muslim; if you do not, you will not know his name.

ref: This story will show you what the kingdom of heaven is like: One day a king decided to call in his officials and ask them to give an account of what they owed him.
